canonical_identity: normalized path, inferred kind, and qualified symbol base

controls.FilePrimary: same BM25 retrieved files and projected candidates; source file rank is primary
controls.EntityPrimary: same BM25 retrieved files and projected candidates; issue-conditioned entity evidence is primary
controls.FileFusionProjection: equal-weight RRF over BM25, structural, and dense file rankings followed by one Entity Projection
controls.ProjectedEntityRRF: Entity Projection per file-ranking source followed by equal-weight entity-level RRF
controls.MURAL: ProjectedEntityRRF with the native structural entity branch
